flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Langston University are 26% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($33.3k vs $45.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 34% at Langston University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.7k vs 2.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Langston University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (64.6% → 53.9%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Langston University rose 137% between 2021 and 2024 (10.9% → 25.9%).
